industries.name: Solar
industries.title: AI Dialer for Solar Sales Teams
industries.description: Call Boss helps solar companies contact leads within 5 minutes of form fill, follow up automatically, and book more solar consultations on autopilot.
industries.hero: Stop Losing Solar Leads to Slow Follow-Up
painPoints: Solar leads decay 90% in the first hour — your reps can't keep up
Average solar company wastes $40K/month on leads that never get called
Reps spend 70% of their day on admin, not closing solar deals

industries.name: Insurance
industries.title: AI Dialer for Insurance Agencies
industries.description: Call Boss auto-dials insurance leads, handles objections with AI, and books policy review appointments — 24/7 without hiring more agents.
industries.hero: Your Insurance Leads Deserve a 5-Minute Response
painPoints: Insurance shoppers call 3+ agencies — first to respond wins 78% of the time
Quoting season overwhelms your team with 10x normal volume
Licensed agents cost $4K+/month before they write a single policy

industries.name: Real Estate
industries.title: AI Dialer for Real Estate Teams
industries.description: Call Boss contacts real estate leads instantly, nurtures cold prospects for months, and books showing appointments automatically.
industries.hero: Every Minute You Wait, Another Agent Calls Your Lead
painPoints: Zillow and Realtor.com leads go to 3+ agents simultaneously
ISAs cost $3,500/month and burn out in 6 months
Database leads from 6 months ago still have 15-20% conversion potential

industries.name: Debt Collection
industries.title: AI Dialer for Debt Collection Agencies
industries.description: Call Boss automates right-party contact, handles compliance, and increases collection rates with persistent AI-powered follow-up.
industries.hero: Reach More Debtors. Collect More. Spend Less.
painPoints: Right-party contact rates under 10% waste 90% of agent time
TCPA compliance violations cost $500-$1,500 per call
Agent turnover in collections exceeds 50% annually

industries.name: B2B SaaS
industries.title: AI Dialer for B2B SaaS Sales Teams
industries.description: Call Boss helps SaaS SDR teams reach more prospects, book more demos, and follow up with trial users automatically.
industries.hero: Your SDRs Are Spending 70% of Their Day Not Selling
painPoints: SDRs make 50-80 dials/day — Call Boss makes 2,000+
Demo no-show rates hit 30-40% without automated reminders
Trial-to-paid conversion drops 60% without timely follow-up
